Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control by July 31?
US-Iran Final Nuclear Deal by August 18, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need to produce exactly ONE paragraph, starting with 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Must mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret overall market sentiment based on the data. The data includes predictions about US invasion of Iran (27% yes), Fed rates no change after July 2026 meeting (93% yes), Fed increase 25 bps (7% yes), Mojtaba Khamenei head of state in Iran end of 2026 (76% yes), LeBron James to GSW (11% yes), US x Iran Effective Ceasefire by July 24 (12% yes), Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control by July 31 (2% yes), US-Iran Final Nuclear Deal by Aug 18 2026 (5% yes).

Interpretation: High confidence in Fed rates staying unchanged (93% yes) suggests stable monetary policy, bullish for markets? Also high probability of Mojtaba Khamenei being head of state (76%) suggests continuity in Iran leadership, maybe less chance of regime change. Low probabilities for US invasion (27%), ceasefire (12%), nuclear deal (5%), Kharg Island loss (2%) suggest low expectation of major geopolitical escalation or resolution. Overall sentiment maybe mixed: stable Fed policy
